missing_or_weak_gates.summary: No lint gate runs in CI; clippy is available locally but not enforced.

proposed_checks: Add `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` as a required CI step, matching what the repo already runs locally.
risk: low -- adding an existing local check to CI does not change runtime behavior
residual_risk: The sample did not inspect a live repository checkout.
A human should confirm the proposed clippy gate does not currently fail on existing code before making it required.
